calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jul-17-2023 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-17-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 501 for Short Cause Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Jaime Edmunson.

Dept. 505; Judge Gail Dekreon; Clerk: N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 3:29:44 p.m and concluding at 3:41:42 p.m.

David Wasserman, Esq. appearing for and with of Plaintiff Joseph Slamovich who is placed under oath and testifies.
Defendant Jaime Edmunson not appearing.

Plaintiff's counsel makes Oral motion to DISMISS Doe Defendants 1-10.
The Court GRANTS Plaintiff's Oral motion.

Plaintiff presents offer of proof and a summary of the facts as set forth on the record.

TESSA GRESKO is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff and testifies.

Plaintiff Joseph Slamovich submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Tenant ledger

The matter is submitted.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Joseph Slamovich, and against Defendant Jaime Edmunson, as follows:

Past Due Rent: $31,997.42
Holdover Damages: $11,056.61

Attorney Fees are Waived

Total Judgment: $43,054.03

Additionally, Plaintiff Joseph Slamovich is entitled to possession of the property located at 105 Grattan Street, City and County of San Francisco, CA 94117.

The Lease is FORFEITED.

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.(D505)

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-13-2023 Off Calendar
